name: SRG Global Ltd
description: SRG Global is an ASX-listed diversified infrastructure services company that originated from the Snowy Mountains Hydro-electric Scheme in 1961. The company provides integrated maintenance, industrial, and engineering construction services across the entire asset life cycle. Serving blue-chip clients in sectors such as water, transport, defence, resources, and energy, SRG Global focuses on delivering technical and complex solutions. With a strong emphasis on an engineering mindset, the firm supports major industries through operational continuity, sustaining capital projects, and specialist civil and facade construction, maintaining a commitment to safety, sustainability, and high-performance culture.
